title: Opening Charge
description: Welcome and introductory charge for the Leaders' Camp.

title: Unveiled Glory
description:
Topic: Unveiled Glory
Text: 2 Corinthians 3:18
Focus: To help participants understand that we are created for God’s glory and are continually transformed through Christ to reflect His glory.

title: Open Heaven Devotional
description: Start the day with corporate devotions, morning alignment, and strategic prayer sessions.

title: Teaching 1 — A Call to Awakening: A Study of Elijah and Elisha
description:
Texts: 2 Kings 2:1–15; Isaiah 52:1
Focus: A call for leaders to rise from complacency, align with God's prophetic purpose, and pass/receive the baton of revival.

title: Devotional Teaching — The Leader's Heart & Consecration
description:
Texts: Psalm 51:10; Romans 12:1–2
Focus: Emphasizing inner purity, personal discipline, and deep alignment as the foundation for leading others in the move of the Greater Glory.

title: Corporate Prayer / Alignment Session — Fanning the Flame
description:
Texts: Leviticus 6:13; 2 Timothy 1:6
Focus: Intense prayers for personal revival, standard-setting, and anointing for leadership.

title: Briefing / Alignment Summit — Rebuilding the Walls
description:
Texts: Nehemiah 2:17–18; Haggai 1:8
Focus: Strategic alignment on Life Way BSF structures, fellowship guidelines, and the blueprint for the 2026/2027 academic session.

title: Opening Rally & Holy Ghost Charge — Behold the Glory
description:
Texts: Isaiah 60:1–3; Haggai 2:9
Focus: Preparing the hearts of all delegates to behold, receive, and manifest the greater glory of God in these last days.

title: Anniversary Thanksgiving & Procession — Forty Years of Grace
description:
Texts: Psalm 136:1–26; Joshua 4:1–9
Focus: Celebrating BSF at 40—commemorating God's faithfulness from 1986 to 2026 and launching the anniversary decade.

title: Morning Devotion & Holy Ghost Hour — Vertical Alignment
description:
Texts: Psalm 63:1–8; Isaiah 40:31
Focus: Corporate worship, deep intercession, and morning alignment to set the day.

title: Teaching 2 — The Weight of Glory: Holiness & Righteousness
description:
Texts: 1 Peter 1:15–16; Isaiah 52:1
Focus: Exploring the holiness required to carry the greater glory without shipwreck.

title: Devotional Charge — Vessels of Honor
description:
Texts: 2 Timothy 2:20–21; Jeremiah 18:1–6
Focus: Guiding students on consecration, purity, and positioning oneself as a vessel meet for the Master's use.

title: Academic & Career Panel — Excelling in the Greater Glory
description:
Texts: Daniel 1:17–20; Colossians 3:23
Focus: Equipping student delegates with strategies for academic success, career pathing, and vocational integrity.

title: Teaching 3 — Unlocking the Greater Glory
description:
Texts: Haggai 2:9; John 14:12
Focus: Understanding the keys to unlocking and walking in the Greater Glory in our generation.

title: Revival Hour / Deliverance Service — Breaking Yokes, Releasing Destiny
description:
Texts: Isaiah 10:27; Obadiah 1:17
Focus: A night of intense revival prayer, breaking of bondages, and restoration of spiritual fire.

title: Morning Devotion & Worship Devotional — Walking in the Spirit
description:
Texts: Galatians 5:16–25; Romans 8:14
Focus: Worship, consecration, and a charge on maintaining a consistent walk in the Holy Ghost.

title: Teaching 4 — The Church & The Greater Glory
description:
Texts: Ephesians 5:27; Matthew 16:18
Focus: Examining the role of the local church and student fellowships in manifesting God's glory to the world.

title: Relationships Seminar — Purity in Relationships
description:
Texts: 1 Thessalonians 4:3–4; Proverbs 4:23
Focus: Practical guidance for young people on choosing a partner, maintaining boundaries, and honoring God in relationships.

title: Alumni Summit / BSF @ 40 Interactive Hour — Bridging the Generations
description:
Texts: Joel 2:28; Psalm 145:4
Focus: An interactive session connecting alumni with student delegates to share testimonies, career mentorship, and structural support.

title: Teachings / Grand Charge — Commissioned for Greater Glory
description:
Texts: Mark 16:15–20; Matthew 28:18–20
Focus: The final charge, commissioning delegates to go back to their campuses and communities as carriers of the Greater Glory.

title: Communion / Anointing & Impartation Service — The Anointing for the Greater Works
description:
Texts: Luke 4:18; Acts 1:8
Focus: Holy Communion, followed by a special session of laying on of hands, anointing, and impartation for greater works.

title: Closing Prayers / Departure — Go in His Glory
description:
Texts: Numbers 6:24–26; Exodus 33:14
Focus: Final prayers, benediction, and departure of delegates.
